working: FIX 1: Helper search — replaced getHelperSearchConfig() with inline {@const isYoutube/isSpotify/isGemini/isDeepseek} — works for any matching URL
FIX 2: captureCategory default already done (was '' with loadCategories auto-set)
FIX 3: analyze_audio.py full rewrite — frame-based spectral (centroid/flux/rolloff/contrast), MFCCs 13 coefficients, all try/except returning null on failure
FIX 4: /capture-screen detects DAW context, fires Haiku for 3 mixing suggestions, returns mixing_suggestions[], BrainTab shows MIXING NOTES section
FIX 5: reference_tracks upsert includes spectral_centroid/contrast/flux/mfcc_mean; startup probes for new columns and warns if missing
notes: Helper search: inline detection triggers for youtube.com|youtu.be, spotify.com, gemini.google.com, deepseek.com. buildSearchUrl is an {@const} arrow fn inside {#each}. MFCCs: 13-coeff array stored as jsonb. Capture-screen mixing suggestions: Haiku call only fires when 'mix'/'daw'/'session' in context OR those keywords in the main analysis text.
